Risk/Blocker: Parcel data license forbids report export or caching.
Mitigation: Perform vendor license audit before beta; implement entitlement gates.

Risk/Blocker: County zoning data is stale, ambiguous, or not machine-readable.
Mitigation: Start with 3-5 counties; human QA; source citations; local adapter.

Risk/Blocker: System implies legal buildability or access.
Mitigation: Safe-language lint; disclaimers; verification tasks; legal review.

Risk/Blocker: Fair housing/steering issue from residential area recommendations.
Mitigation: No demographic scoring; legal review before recommendation features.

Risk/Blocker: Output becomes regulated AVM if valuation expands.
Mitigation: No mortgage valuation; legal review before valuation features.

Risk/Blocker: Postgres overloaded by raster-heavy workloads.
Mitigation: Store raw rasters as COG/object assets; derive summary metrics; async jobs.

Risk/Blocker: Projection/CRS error causes wrong overlays.
Mitigation: CRS validation tests; golden parcels; geometry pipeline review.

Risk/Blocker: Source API outage silently becomes 'no issue found'.
Mitigation: Record source failure evidence; fail report or mark unknown.

Risk/Blocker: Per-report cost exceeds price.
Mitigation: Instrument cost per report; concierge price test.

Risk/Blocker: Users want listing/comps search more than due diligence.
Mitigation: Manual beta interviews; compare willingness to pay.

Risk/Blocker: Human review does not scale.
Mitigation: Risk-based review after golden tests; structured reviewer console.

Risk/Blocker: Wetlands/flood layers treated as final regulatory determinations.
Mitigation: Caveats; professional verification tasks.

Risk/Blocker: Legal access cannot be inferred from maps.
Mitigation: Always phrase as access risk; title/easement verification task.

Risk/Blocker: Water rights/well viability too complex in first geography.
Mitigation: Select geography carefully; water module separate; cautious wording.

Risk/Blocker: Mineral source data stale or rights severed.
Mitigation: Screen only; never assert mineral rights; cite source freshness.

Risk/Blocker: Owner/user data exposed across workspaces.
Mitigation: RBAC, tenant scoping, audit, tests.

Risk/Blocker: Vendor schemas leak into core logic.
Mitigation: Adapter normalization; evidence layer boundary.

Risk/Blocker: UI computes conclusions client-side.
Mitigation: Server-authoritative claim/rules/report APIs.

Risk/Blocker: Commercial data terms prohibit AI processing.
Mitigation: License review includes AI-use flag.

Risk/Blocker: Single score hides missing data and uncertainty.
Mitigation: Suitability/confidence separation; unknown count visible.

Risk/Blocker: Global promise exceeds data/legal coverage.
Mitigation: Tiered global labels; no Tier 2 claims without local data.

Risk/Blocker: Report runs are not reproducible after source updates.
Mitigation: Dataset versions/source manifests/ruleset versioning.

Risk/Blocker: Source update breaks golden parcel results.
Mitigation: Regression tests before source promotion.

Risk/Blocker: Map/tile/egress costs spike under UI usage.
Mitigation: Cache tiles/assets; cap usage; budget alarms.

Risk/Blocker: Report wording creates reliance/professional liability.
Mitigation: Legal review, E&O insurance review, cautious language.
